Notes: One UPDATE contains two identical add_rr operations for the same owner/type/class/TTL/RDATA. The target name starts with a single TXT RR so set-normalizing servers may reply differently from implementations that reject or otherwise handle the redundant second add.

Steps.Description: Add the same TXT RR to dup.campus.edu. twice in one UPDATE.

Steps.Name: dup.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the RRset remains a single logical TXT RR or whether the UPDATE was rejected.
